title: Add POST /api/kioku/search endpoint
implementation_notes: Create app/server/api/kioku/search.post.ts as a Nuxt server route.
Body: { query: string }. Validate: reject empty/missing query with 400.
Call storage.search(query) to get hits, then resolveKiokuRetrieval(readModel, hits, query) to hydrate canonical entities.
Response shape: { query, hits, projects, boards, tasks, approvals }.
This endpoint makes Kioku self-hosted — the createKiokuRetrievalClient can now point to this local URL.
Add KIOKU_SEARCH_PATH env override so clients can point at an external Kioku service instead.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/kioku/search with { query: 'ship' } returns a valid KiokuRetrievalResult payload.
Empty or missing query returns 400 with a descriptive error message.
Kioku unavailability (storage error) returns 503 and does not mutate vault state.
The response never includes raw vault body text, executionNotes, or credential-like fields.
The endpoint is covered by at least one integration test using a real in-memory storage.
completion_summary: Added POST /api/kioku/search with sanitized canonical results, query validation, and on-demand sync against the SQLite index.
